description: This file defines the SiteAssetsController class, an ASP.NET Core API controller managing site asset operations such as add/edit/copy, list, retrieve by ID, delete, and prepare copy workflows.

classes.name: SiteAssetsController
classes.description: API controller for managing site assets, including CRUD operations and copy workflows.

methods.name: ManageSiteAssets
methods.description: Handles POST requests to add, edit, or copy site assets.

methods.name: GetSiteAssets
methods.description: Handles GET requests to list assets for a specific site with optional search and includeDeleted filter.

methods.name: GetSiteAssetById
methods.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve a full asset aggregate by ID for editing or copying.

methods.name: RemoveSiteAsset
methods.description: Handles POST requests to delete (soft delete) a site asset.

methods.name: PrepareCopy
methods.description: Handles POST requests to prepare data for copying an asset, including confirmation payload and hydrated snapshot.
